---
title: "About This Website"
format: html
---

---

**R Data Science Tutorials** is an educational platform focused on teaching practical data science using the **R programming language**.

The goal is to help learners understand how to apply data science techniques to real problems.

---

## What This Site Covers

Topics include:

* data wrangling using tidyverse
* statistical analysis
* machine learning workflows
* data visualization
* reproducible research

All tutorials are written with a **hands-on learning approach**.

---

## Who This Site Is For

This site is designed for:

* beginners learning R
* data analysts improving their workflow
* researchers working with data
* students studying data science

---

## Author

**Manoj Kumar**

Professional background includes:

* industrial analytics
* machine learning
* ESG and sustainability analytics
* academic research

---

## Technology Behind This Site

This website is built using:

* Quarto
* R
* tidyverse
* Quarto Pub hosting
